'''jayosho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pocketlight|pocketlight]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-y-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pocketlight|pocketlight]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| jayosho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæyesheth|jæyesheth]] || [[word:jæyeshej|jæyeshej]] || [[word:jæyeshesh|jæyeshesh]] || [[word:jæyeshe|jæyeshe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jayoyoshoth|jayoyoshoth]] || [[word:jayoyoshoj|jayoyoshoj]] || [[word:jayoyoshosh|jayoyoshosh]] || [[word:jayoyosho|jayoyosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jayoshoth|jayoshoth]] || [[word:jayoshoj|jayoshoj]] || [[word:jayoshosh|jayoshosh]] || [[word:jayosho|jayosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jayofshoth|jayofshoth]] || [[word:jayofshoj|jayofshoj]] || [[word:jayofshosh|jayofshosh]] || [[word:jayofshof|jayofshof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jayoshotho|jayoshotho]] || [[word:jayoshojo|jayoshojo]] || [[word:jayoshosho|jayoshosho]] || [[word:jayoshoko|jayoshoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jayoshoth|jayoshoth]] || [[word:jayoshoj|jayoshoj]] || [[word:jayoshosh|jayoshosh]] || [[word:jayosho|jayosho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jayoshothol|jayoshothol]] || [[word:jayoshojol|jayoshojol]] || [[word:jayoshoshol|jayoshoshol]] || [[word:jayoshokol|jayoshokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jayoshothotho|jayoshothotho]] || [[word:jayoshojojo|jayoshojojo]] || [[word:jayoshoshosho|jayoshoshosho]] || [[word:jayoshoko|jayoshoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jayoshothon|jayoshothon]] || [[word:jayoshojon|jayoshojon]] || [[word:jayoshoshon|jayoshoshon]] || [[word:jayoshokon|jayoshokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jayoshothoro|jayoshothoro]] || [[word:jayoshojoro|jayoshojoro]] || [[word:jayoshoshoro|jayoshoshoro]] || [[word:jayoshokoro|jayoshokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
